summary: Iteration 100 - Decision Policy Engine testing complete. Backend: 31/31 tests passed. All decision policy endpoints functional: POST /api/document-intelligence/policies (create policy), GET /api/document-intelligence/policies (list policies with filters, 9 default auto-seeded), PATCH /api/document-intelligence/policies/{policy_id} (update policy), DELETE /api/document-intelligence/policies/{policy_id} (soft-delete/deactivate), POST /api/document-intelligence/evaluate-decision/{doc_id} (authoritative decision endpoint - evaluates policies in priority order), POST /api/document-intelligence/execute-decision/{decision_id} (executes ready decisions, blocked/hold returns informative not-executable response), GET /api/document-intelligence/decision/{doc_id} (latest decision), GET /api/document-intelligence/decision-queue (blocked + review_required decisions with file_name, reason_summary). Document enrichment: latest_decision_action, latest_automation_level, latest_decision_status, latest_decision_reasons, decision_executable, decision_target_summary. Frontend: DocumentIntelligencePanel has decision-engine-section (verified data-testid exists in code). Regression: All iteration_98 bundle and iteration_99 lifecycle endpoints still work.

integration_issues.issue: Session persistence across direct URL navigation was inconsistent during testing - navigation via sidebar clicks works correctly

passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/document-intelligence/policies creates new policy with policy_id, name, priority, conditions, decision_action, automation_level, reason_template
Backend: GET /api/document-intelligence/policies returns 9+ default seeded policies sorted by priority
Backend: GET /api/document-intelligence/policies?document_type=Sales_PO filters correctly
Backend: GET /api/document-intelligence/policies?is_active=true filters correctly
Backend: PATCH /api/document-intelligence/policies/{policy_id} updates name, priority, reason_template
Backend: PATCH /api/document-intelligence/policies/{policy_id} returns 404 for non-existent policy
Backend: DELETE /api/document-intelligence/policies/{policy_id} soft-deletes (is_active=false)
Backend: DELETE /api/document-intelligence/policies/{policy_id} returns 404 for non-existent policy
Backend: POST /api/document-intelligence/evaluate-decision/{doc_id} returns decision_id, decision_action, decision_status, decision_reasons, input_snapshot, target_summary
Backend: POST /api/document-intelligence/evaluate-decision/{doc_id} returns 404 for missing document
Backend: Block policy (priority 1) fires for automation_readiness=blocked documents
Backend: Decision reasons include machine-readable codes (policy_match, readiness_blocked, missing_fields)
Backend: Input snapshot contains all decision-relevant fields (document_type, automation_readiness, entity_resolution_status, transaction_match_status, lifecycle_status, bundle_id, bundle_type)
Backend: POST /api/document-intelligence/execute-decision/{decision_id} executes ready decisions
Backend: POST /api/document-intelligence/execute-decision/{decision_id} blocked decision returns {executed: false, reason: 'blocked'}
Backend: POST /api/document-intelligence/execute-decision/{decision_id} returns 404 for non-existent decision
Backend: GET /api/document-intelligence/decision/{doc_id} returns latest decision
Backend: GET /api/document-intelligence/decision/{doc_id} returns 404 for doc without decision
Backend: GET /api/document-intelligence/decision-queue returns blocked + review_required decisions with file_name, reason_summary, status_counts
Backend: GET /api/document-intelligence/decision-queue supports limit/offset pagination
Backend: Document intelligence enriched with latest_decision_action, latest_automation_level, latest_decision_status, decision_executable
Backend: Policies sorted by priority ascending (lower = higher priority)
Backend: Decision reasons have code and message fields
Backend: Regression - POST /api/document-intelligence/detect-bundles still works
Backend: Regression - GET /api/document-intelligence/bundles still works
Backend: Regression - GET /api/document-intelligence/bundles/{bundle_id} still works
Backend: Regression - GET /api/document-intelligence/lifecycle-issues still works
Backend: Regression - POST /api/document-intelligence/process/{doc_id} still works
Frontend: DocumentIntelligencePanel.js contains decision-engine-section with data-testids (evaluate-decision-btn, execute-decision-btn, re-evaluate-btn, decision-reasons)
Frontend: Decision Engine section shows action badge, automation level badge, reasons list, buttons
Frontend: api.js has all decision policy API functions (createPolicy, listPolicies, updatePolicy, deletePolicy, evaluateDecision, executeDecision, getDecision, getDecisionQueue)
critical_code_review_comments: Backend: decision_policy_service.py well-structured with 9 default policies covering key scenarios (block critical fields, block duplicate, auto-draft ready, auto-link matched, hold ambiguous)
Backend: Policy evaluation uses MongoDB-style operators ($in, $nin, $eq, $ne, $gte, $lte) correctly implemented in Python
Backend: Decision upserts (one decision per document) correctly keyed on document_id
Backend: execute_decision correctly calls existing auto-draft (create_auto_draft) and auto-link logic - no duplication
Backend: Decision reasons generation includes both human-readable message and machine-readable code
Backend router: Decision policy endpoints correctly placed BEFORE catch-all /{doc_id} route
Frontend: DocumentIntelligencePanel.js has proper data-testids for all Decision Engine interactive elements

success_rate.frontend: 95% (code verified, UI navigation had session issues during Playwright testing)

seed_data_created.existing_test_bundles: TEST-BUNDLE-A (Sales_PO, blocked), TEST-BUNDLE-B (AP_Invoice, draft created), bundle BDL-B739B77E
seed_data_created.decisions_evaluated: DEC-* for TEST-BUNDLE-A (blocked), DEC-* for TEST-BUNDLE-B (executed - draft created)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 100 - Decision Policy Engine fully tested. New endpoints: POST /api/document-intelligence/policies (create), GET /api/document-intelligence/policies (list with filters), PATCH /api/document-intelligence/policies/{policy_id} (update), DELETE /api/document-intelligence/policies/{policy_id} (soft-delete), POST /api/document-intelligence/evaluate-decision/{doc_id} (authoritative decision), POST /api/document-intelligence/execute-decision/{decision_id} (execute ready), GET /api/document-intelligence/decision/{doc_id} (latest decision), GET /api/document-intelligence/decision-queue (blocked/review_required queue). Default policies: Block critical fields (priority 1), Block duplicate (priority 2), Auto-link matched (priority 5), Auto-draft ready (priority 10), Hold needs-review (priority 15), Hold ambiguous (priority 20). Decision actions: create_draft, link_existing, hold_for_review, block. Decision statuses: ready, executed, blocked, review_required. Document enrichment: latest_decision_action, latest_automation_level, latest_decision_status, latest_decision_reasons, decision_executable, decision_target_summary. Key data-testids: decision-engine-section, evaluate-decision-btn, execute-decision-btn, re-evaluate-btn, decision-reasons. Activity events: decision_evaluated, decision_executed, decision_blocked, decision_held. Test data: TEST-BUNDLE-A decision=block, TEST-BUNDLE-B decision=executed (draft created).

create_policy.body: name, document_type, bundle_type, target_entity_type, priority, conditions, decision_action, automation_level, reason_template

list_policies.returns: array of policies sorted by priority ascending, 9 default auto-seeded

evaluate_decision.returns: decision_id, document_id, policy_id, decision_action, automation_level, decision_status, decision_reasons (code+message), input_snapshot, target_entity_type, target_summary
evaluate_decision.behavior: Evaluates active policies in priority order, upserts one decision per document

execute_decision.returns: {executed: true/false, decision_id, decision_action, decision_status, result or reason}
execute_decision.behavior: Only executes ready decisions. create_draft calls auto-draft, link_existing calls auto-link. Blocked/hold returns {executed: false, reason: '...'}

mocked_apis_note: Business Central API operates in DEMO_MODE. Email Service is MOCKED (in-memory). SharePoint storage is MOCKED.
